summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Blanket/Contract PO feature (P2). Backend API tests: 15/15 PASS (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all 5 business rules through actual user flows. All core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with admin credentials
Backend: Create Blanket PO with qty + value cap (Rule 1.c)
Backend: List Blanket contracts (GET /purchase-orders/blanket)
Backend: Get Blanket detail with drawdown fields
Backend: Create normal call-off (Rule 2.a) - child PO created
Backend: Price override without reason - correctly rejected (Rule 3.b)
Backend: Price override with reason - accepted (Rule 3.b)
Backend: Over-call qty forces approval (Rule 4.b)
Backend: Close contract endpoint
Backend: Call-off on closed contract - correctly rejected (Rule 5.a)
Backend: List separation - blanket POs excluded from standard list, call-offs included
Frontend: Login as admin
Frontend: Navigate to Blanket/Kontrak PO view via sidebar
Frontend: View loaded with all status tabs (Semua, Aktif, Habis, Kadaluarsa, Ditutup)
Frontend: 'Buat Kontrak' button present and clickable
Frontend: Create Blanket contract modal opens
Frontend: Fill supplier name, select warehouse, select product, fill qty/price
Frontend: Contract creation successful, appears in list
Frontend: Contract detail panel opens with all elements
Frontend: Value summary shows Plafon/Terpakai/Sisa (Rule 1.c)
Frontend: Contract items show Kontrak/Terpakai/Sisa quantities
Frontend: Call-off list initially empty
Frontend: Create normal call-off (qty=10) - submitted successfully
Frontend: Call-off appears in list after creation
Frontend: Drawdown updates after call-off (value_called increases)
Frontend: Price override triggers override reason field (Rule 3.b)
Frontend: Price override with reason submitted successfully
Frontend: Over-call (qty=500) shows warning banner (Rule 4.b)
Frontend: Over-call warning states 'dipaksa melewati approval'
Frontend: Over-call submitted and forced approval (Rule 4.b)
Frontend: Closed contract shows inactive banner with reason (Rule 5.a)
Frontend: Call-off button disabled on closed contract (Rule 5.a)
Frontend: Standard PO view shows call-offs but NOT blanket contracts (regression check)
Frontend: All call-offs created show 'Waiting Approval' status correctly

rule_1c_qty_value_cap.backend: Contract created with qty per item + value cap. Auto-calculation working (1000 × 50000 = Rp 50.000.000)
rule_1c_qty_value_cap.frontend: Value summary displays correctly: Plafon Kontrak, Terpakai (call-off aktif), Sisa Nilai. All values formatted in Indonesian Rupiah

rule_2a_calloff_child_po.backend: Call-off creates child PO with po_type='call_off', parent_po_id linkage correct, appears in standard PO list
rule_2a_calloff_child_po.frontend: Call-off modal opens, qty input works, submission creates child PO, appears in call-off list with PO number and status

rule_3b_price_override.backend: Override without reason returns 400. Override with reason returns 200 and saves override price
rule_3b_price_override.frontend: Changing price triggers 'Alasan Override Harga' field (required). Field appears dynamically. Submission without reason blocked, with reason succeeds

rule_4b_overcall_approval.backend: Over-call (qty > remaining) allowed but forces status='waiting_approval', approval_required=true, approval_reason contains 'blanket_overcall'
rule_4b_overcall_approval.frontend: Over-call warning banner appears with orange background stating 'Over-call terdeteksi — call-off ini melebihi sisa kontrak, sehingga PO anak akan dipaksa melewati approval (aturan 4.b)'. Shows qty and value details. After submit, notice confirms 'menunggu APPROVAL (over-call/deviasi)'

rule_5a_closed_contract.backend: Close contract endpoint works. Call-off on closed contract returns 400
rule_5a_closed_contract.frontend: Closed contract shows inactive banner: 'Kontrak closed — call-off baru ditolak (aturan 5.a). Alasan: [reason]'. 'Buat Call-off' button disabled (grayed out). Status pill shows 'Ditutup'

list_separation.backend: GET /purchase-orders excludes blanket POs, includes call-offs. GET /purchase-orders/blanket returns only blanket contracts
list_separation.frontend: Blanket/Kontrak PO view shows only blanket contracts. Standard 'Pesanan Pembelian (PO)' view shows call-offs (PO-00006, PO-00007, PO-00008) with 'Waiting Approval' status, but NOT blanket contracts (PO-00001, PO-00005)

ui_quality.navigation: Sidebar navigation working correctly. 'Pembelian' group expands, 'Blanket / Kontrak PO' nav item highlighted when active
ui_quality.tabs: All 5 status tabs present with counts: Semua (2), Aktif (1), Habis (0), Kadaluarsa (0), Ditutup (1)
ui_quality.modals: Create and Call-off modals open/close correctly. Form fields properly labeled in Bahasa Indonesia
ui_quality.data_display: Currency formatted as 'Rp X.XXX.XXX', quantities with proper units (meter), dates in DD/MM/YYYY format
ui_quality.responsive_elements: Progress bars show usage percentage, color changes (blue < 100%, orange >= 100%)
ui_quality.status_pills: Contract status pills: Aktif (green), Ditutup (gray). Call-off status: Waiting Approval (orange), Pending (yellow)
